record.field:
for applicant in records: job = applicant.job_id if not job: continue
role_template = job.x_grc_role_template_id if role_template: if applicant.x_role_composition_id: composition = applicant.x_role_composition_id elif applicant.x_role_composition_ids: composition = applicant.x_role_composition_ids[0] applicant.write({'x_role_composition_id': composition.id}) else: composition = env['x_hr.recruitment_role_composition'].create({ 'x_code': 'RC-%s-%s' % (applicant.id, job.id), 'x_name': '%s / %s' % (job.name or '', applicant.display_name or ''), 'x_state': 'draft', 'x_applicant_id': applicant.id, 'x_job_id': job.id, 'x_role_template_id': role_template.id, 'x_documents_folder_id': job.x_documents_folder_id.id if job.x_documents_folder_id else False, 'x_signature_profile_id': job.x_grc_signature_profile_id.id if job.x_grc_signature_profile_id else False, }) applicant.write({'x_role_composition_id': composition.id}) for template_line in role_template.x_line_ids.sorted(key=lambda line: (line.x_sequence or 0, line.id)): env['x_hr.recruitment_role_composition_line'].create({ 'x_composition_id': composition.id, 'x_sequence': template_line.x_sequence or 0, 'x_template_line_id': template_line.id, 'x_functional_area_id': template_line.x_functional_area_id.id if template_line.x_functional_area_id else False, 'x_function_id': template_line.x_function_id.id if template_line.x_function_id else False, 'x_minimum_requirement': template_line.x_minimum_requirement, 'x_expected_output': template_line.x_expected_output, 'x_is_included': bool(template_line.x_required), 'x_notes': template_line.x_notes, }) composition_lines = composition.x_line_ids total_line_count = len(composition_lines) included_line_count = len(composition_lines.filtered(lambda line: line.x_is_included)) composition.write({ 'x_total_line_count': total_line_count, 'x_included_line_count': included_line_count, 'x_completion_ratio': (float(included_line_count) / float(total_line_count) * 100.0) if total_line_count else 0.0, 'x_state': 'completed' if total_line_count and included_line_count == total_line_count else 'in_review' if included_line_count else 'draft', 'x_last_refresh_at': datetime.datetime.now(), })
interview_template = job.x_grc_interview_template_id if interview_template: if applicant.x_interview_evaluation_id: evaluation = applicant.x_interview_evaluation_id elif applicant.x_interview_evaluation_ids: evaluation = applicant.x_interview_evaluation_ids[0] applicant.write({'x_interview_evaluation_id': evaluation.id}) else: evaluation = env['x_hr.recruitment_interview_evaluation'].create({ 'x_code': 'IE-%s-%s' % (applicant.id, job.id), 'x_name': '%s / %s' % (job.name or '', applicant.display_name or ''), 'x_state': 'draft', 'x_applicant_id': applicant.id, 'x_job_id': job.id, 'x_template_id': interview_template.id, 'x_interviewer_user_id': applicant.user_id.id if applicant.user_id else False, 'x_documents_folder_id': job.x_documents_folder_id.id if job.x_documents_folder_id else False, 'x_signature_profile_id': job.x_grc_signature_profile_id.id if job.x_grc_signature_profile_id else False, }) applicant.write({'x_interview_evaluation_id': evaluation.id}) for template_line in interview_template.x_line_ids.sorted(key=lambda line: (line.x_sequence or 0, line.id)): env['x_hr.recruitment_interview_evaluation_line'].create({ 'x_evaluation_id': evaluation.id, 'x_sequence': template_line.x_sequence or 0, 'x_template_line_id': template_line.id, 'x_question': template_line.x_question, 'x_answer_text': template_line.x_scoring_criterion, 'x_max_score': template_line.x_max_score or 0, 'x_weight': template_line.x_weight or 0.0, 'x_is_answered': False, 'x_notes': template_line.x_notes or template_line.x_internal_notes, }) evaluation_lines = evaluation.x_line_ids total_line_count = len(evaluation_lines) answered_lines = evaluation_lines.filtered(lambda line: line.x_is_answered or line.x_answer_text) total_score = sum((line.x_score or 0) for line in evaluation_lines) max_total_score = sum((line.x_max_score or 0) for line in evaluation_lines) evaluation.write({ 'x_total_score': total_score, 'x_max_total_score': max_total_score, 'x_completion_ratio': (float(len(answered_lines)) / float(total_line_count) * 100.0) if total_line_count else 0.0, 'x_state': 'completed' if total_line_count and len(answered_lines) == total_line_count else 'in_review' if answered_lines else 'draft', 'x_last_refresh_at': datetime.datetime.now(), })
checklist_template = job.x_grc_document_checklist_template_id if checklist_template: if applicant.x_document_checklist_id: checklist = applicant.x_document_checklist_id elif applicant.x_document_checklist_ids: checklist = applicant.x_document_checklist_ids[0] applicant.write({'x_document_checklist_id': checklist.id}) else: checklist = env['x_hr.recruitment_document_checklist'].create({ 'x_code': 'DC-%s-%s' % (applicant.id, job.id), 'x_name': '%s / %s' % (job.name or '', applicant.display_name or ''), 'x_state': 'draft', 'x_applicant_id': applicant.id, 'x_job_id': job.id, 'x_template_id': checklist_template.id, 'x_documents_folder_id': job.x_documents_folder_id.id if job.x_documents_folder_id else False, 'x_signature_profile_id': job.x_grc_signature_profile_id.id if job.x_grc_signature_profile_id else False, }) applicant.write({'x_document_checklist_id': checklist.id}) for template_line in checklist_template.x_line_ids.sorted(key=lambda line: (line.x_sequence or 0, line.id)): env['x_hr.recruitment_document_checklist_line'].create({ 'x_checklist_id': checklist.id, 'x_sequence': template_line.x_sequence or 0, 'x_template_line_id': template_line.id, 'x_document_type_id': template_line.x_document_type_id.id if template_line.x_document_type_id else False, 'x_is_required': bool(template_line.x_is_mandatory or template_line.x_required), 'x_state': 'draft', 'x_requires_expiry': template_line.x_requires_expiry, 'x_renewal_period_months': template_line.x_renewal_period_months, 'x_signoff_role': template_line.x_signoff_role, 'x_notes': template_line.x_notes, }) checklist_lines = checklist.x_line_ids required_lines = checklist_lines.filtered(lambda line: line.x_is_required) completed_lines = checklist_lines.filtered(lambda line: line.x_is_completed) required_line_count = len(required_lines) completed_line_count = len(completed_lines) missing_line_count = max(required_line_count - completed_line_count, 0) checklist.write({ 'x_required_line_count': required_line_count, 'x_completed_line_count': completed_line_count, 'x_missing_line_count': missing_line_count, 'x_completion_ratio': (float(completed_line_count) / float(required_line_count) * 100.0) if required_line_count else 0.0, 'x_is_complete': bool(required_line_count and missing_line_count == 0), 'x_state': 'completed' if required_line_count and missing_line_count == 0 else 'in_progress' if completed_line_count else 'draft', 'x_last_refresh_at': datetime.datetime.now(), })
declaration_pack = job.x_grc_declaration_pack_id if declaration_pack: if applicant.x_declaration_envelope_id: envelope = applicant.x_declaration_envelope_id elif applicant.x_declaration_envelope_ids: envelope = applicant.x_declaration_envelope_ids[0] applicant.write({'x_declaration_envelope_id': envelope.id}) else: envelope = env['x_hr.recruitment_declaration_envelope'].create({ 'x_code': 'DE-%s-%s' % (applicant.id, job.id), 'x_name': '%s / %s' % (job.name or '', applicant.display_name or ''), 'x_state': 'draft', 'x_applicant_id': applicant.id, 'x_job_id': job.id, 'x_declaration_pack_id': declaration_pack.id, 'x_documents_folder_id': job.x_documents_folder_id.id if job.x_documents_folder_id else False, 'x_signature_profile_id': job.x_grc_signature_profile_id.id if job.x_grc_signature_profile_id else False, }) applicant.write({'x_declaration_envelope_id': envelope.id}) for template_line in declaration_pack.x_line_ids.sorted(key=lambda line: (line.x_sequence or 0, line.id)): signer_roles = [] if template_line.x_applicant_must_sign: signer_roles.append('applicant') if template_line.x_hr_must_sign: signer_roles.append('hr_manager') if not signer_roles: signer_roles.append('applicant') for signer_role in signer_roles: env['x_hr.recruitment_declaration_envelope_line'].create({ 'x_envelope_id': envelope.id, 'x_sequence': template_line.x_sequence or 0, 'x_declaration_pack_line_id': template_line.id, 'x_signer_role': signer_role, 'x_is_signed': False, 'x_notes': template_line.x_notes, }) envelope_lines = envelope.x_line_ids required_line_count = len(envelope_lines) signed_line_count = len(envelope_lines.filtered(lambda line: line.x_is_signed)) pending_line_count = max(required_line_count - signed_line_count, 0) envelope.write({ 'x_required_line_count': required_line_count, 'x_signed_line_count': signed_line_count, 'x_pending_line_count': pending_line_count, 'x_completion_ratio': (float(signed_line_count) / float(required_line_count) * 100.0) if required_line_count else 0.0, 'x_is_complete': bool(required_line_count and pending_line_count == 0), 'x_state': 'completed' if required_line_count and pending_line_count == 0 else 'in_review' if signed_line_count else 'draft', 'x_last_refresh_at': datetime.datetime.now(), })
applicant.message_post(body='Recruitment runtime prepared from the baseline vacancy.')
